title: Neuronal parts list and wiring diagram for a visual system
abstract: A complete parts list and wiring diagram for the Drosophila optic lobe visual system derived from the FlyWire whole-brain connectome. Identifies all neuronal cell types in the optic lobe and maps their synaptic connectivity, providing a comprehensive blueprint of visual processing circuits.
notes: FlyWire optic lobe companion paper. Cross-listed from Murthy lab.
